title: Cold Weather Safety and Hypothermia Prevention
description: Reviewed OSHA cold stress guidelines and company cold weather protection plan. Covered signs of hypothermia and frostbite
topic: proper layering of PPE for sub-zero conditions
attendees_count: minimum temperature thresholds for suspended operations
notes: and buddy-system check-ins during extreme cold. Demonstrated proper hand warmer and heated vest usage.
column10: All MSP North Terminal site workers attended. Warming tent locations updated and posted at all site entrances. Workers reminded of right to refuse unsafe work in extreme cold.

title: Steel Erection Safety – Controlled Decking Zone
description: Reviewed OSHA 1926 Subpart R requirements for steel erection. Covered controlled decking zone boundaries
topic: fall protection requirements at leading edge
scheduled_date: prohibited access zones during crane lifts
attendees_count: and connectors' personal fall protection equipment requirements at heights above two stories. Crane signal communications reviewed.
column9: All ironworkers and crane crew attended. Controlled decking zone boundaries re-staked after talk. Crane exclusion zones marked with barrier tape on all active pick areas.

title: Electrical Safety and Lockout/Tagout
description: Covered LOTO procedures per OSHA 29 CFR 1910.147. Demonstrated proper de-energization sequence for 480V temporary power panels. Reviewed multi-energy source isolation and group lock box procedures. Covered arc flash PPE requirements for electricians working on energized equipment above 50V.
notes: All electricians and MEP trades attended. Three workers identified who did not have personal locks on site – locks issued immediately. LOTO procedure placards laminated and posted at all electrical panels.
